I/O carrier hardware
====================

This section covers the electrical design, component selection, and mechanical specifications of the BlackPill I/O Carrier.

.. figure:: /images/hardware/01_BlackPillInterface/38_BalckPillIOCarrier_with_Bluethooth.jpg
   :alt: BlackPill I/O carrier with BlackPill and Bluetooht-Module
   :width: 35%
   :name: BPIOC_with_bluethooth
   
   BlackPill I/O carrier with BlackPill and HC-05 Bluetooth-Module
